name: Acme Corp — Enterprise Expansion
notes: Champion went dark after legal review. Contract almost finalized. High risk of churn.

name: GlobeTech — Platform License
notes: Proposal sent 5 weeks ago. No response. Close date approaching. Competitor actively engaged.

notes: Large deal, barely touched. Original intro call happened 2 months ago. Needs revival.

name: Streamline Inc — Renewal
notes: Active negotiation on pricing. Close to signature. Push for close this week.

notes: Pilot SOW sent. Waiting on procurement approval. Slight delay acceptable.

name: ClearPath Logistics — SMB
notes: Early stage, good engagement. Nurture with content.

name: Vortex Systems — Expansion
notes: Expansion deal on existing customer. Positive signals but slow internal approvals.

name: DataHarbor — Enterprise
notes: Largest deal in pipeline. No owner assigned. Critical to claim and activate immediately.

notes: Small deal, healthy engagement. Normal progression.

name: OmniCloud — Security Add-on
notes: High-touch deal, good momentum. Security compliance docs pending from customer side.
